name: Axl
description: Axl is a gigantic tarantula and an optional boss hidden in Pine Hill. Most of its body shrugs off absurd punishment until you manage to topple it and create a real opening on the scar across its abdomen.
behavior: It opens with bites, combos, and leg stomps to keep you trapped under immediate pressure. Until it is stunned, the armored sections of its body heavily reduce incoming damage and force the whole fight around stagger windows.
interactionWithPlayer: It is one of the first optional bosses that truly demands understanding a specific mechanic. Raw damage is not enough; you have to read the strings, survive the space it controls, and treat each knockdown as a short true-damage phase.
interactionWithCreatures: Its arena is effectively reserved for the duel. The moment Axl appears, everything else stops mattering and the encounter becomes about surviving its total space control.
strategy: Do not waste resources hitting random body parts. Play for the stun, climb onto the abdomen when it falls, and jump off before the rear buck. Water, explosive, and stabbing damage help a lot, but execution matters more than raw DPS here.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Walking Stomp: 1. Basic Bite: 95. 3-Bite Combo: 95. Combo Finisher: 95. Leg Stomp: 115. Back Buck: 150. Hair Wave: 100. Den Pounce: 999999. Charge: 100.

inflicts: All of its physical attacks deal busting damage.
specialTraits: The scar on the abdomen is the true damage window when Axl is stunned.

abilities.name: Walking Stomp
abilities.description: Minor contact damage while it repositions, but still enough to finish you if you stay underneath.

abilities.name: Basic Bite
abilities.description: A quick blockable bite used to start pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: Three consecutive, readable bites; one of the best moments to counterattack comes right after it ends.

abilities.name: Combo Finisher
abilities.description: The heaviest follow-up in the combo string. If you read it well, it leaves a short punish window.

abilities.name: Leg Stomp
abilities.description: It lifts one leg and slams it into the ground. This move is better dodged than blocked.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: It shakes violently to throw off anyone who stays on its back for too long.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: In later phases it covers a lot of ground instantly and completely resets positioning.

abilities.name: Hair Wave
abilities.description: An area pulse used to push you out from under the body and stop free damage.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.trigger: Begins as soon as Axl lunges from the grass into the middle of the arena.
bossPhases.summary: Axl opens the fight with simple bites, combo strings and leg stomps. Most of its body is still heavily resistant, so the real objective is to topple it and expose the scar on the abdomen.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Base boss pace; it leaves relatively clear punish windows after the bite combo.
newPatterns: It mostly relies on the basic bite, the 3-bite combo and the leg stomp.
If you stay on the abdomen for too long, it answers with Back Buck.

abilities.name: Basic Bite
abilities.description: A quick blockable bite used to start pressure.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: The main chain in this phase and one of the best punish windows once it finishes.

abilities.name: Leg Stomp
abilities.description: A heavy strike that is better dodged than tanked underneath.

specialTraits: The abdominal scar is the real damage window while Axl is stunned.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.trigger: At 80% it roars, stuns everyone, burrows and returns with much heavier movement pressure.
bossPhases.summary: The second phase shrinks safe windows and forces far more repositioning. Axl starts mixing charges and pulses to push you out from under the body.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: It attacks more frequently and punishes positional mistakes much harder.
newPatterns: Adds Charge to close distance extremely quickly.
Uses Hair Wave to push you out of free damage range.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: It covers half the arena and completely resets spacing in an instant.

abilities.name: Hair Wave
abilities.description: Area pulse used to stop you from sitting under the body for free damage.

abilities.name: Combo Finisher
abilities.description: Ends the string with a heavier bite that punishes lazy defense.

specialTraits: During the burrow transition it ignores both damage and stun.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.trigger: In the final stretch it leaves less recovery between strings and punishes long abdomen climbs much harder.
bossPhases.summary: The final phase is the most suffocating one. The fight becomes all about maintaining spacing and squeezing every stun without overstaying.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Maximum aggression with almost no long punish windows left.
newPatterns: Back Buck comes out faster if you insist on staying on the back.
It chains Charge into stomps to close off escape routes.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: Its direct answer to greed on the abdomen during the end of the fight.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Used much more often and chained directly into fresh pressure.

specialTraits: You still need to work around the abdomen when it falls; the rest of the body continues to shrug off mediocre damage.
